meta.title: Emotional Age Test | DopaBrain
meta.description: How emotionally mature are you? Drag sliders across 10 real-life scenarios to discover your true emotional age.

app.title: Emotional Age Test
app.subtitle: How old is your heart?
app.description: Drag the slider between two reactions across 10 emotional scenarios to discover your true emotional age.

s1.text: Your friend cancels plans at the last minute.

s2.text: Someone criticizes your work in front of others.

s3.text: Your partner hasn't texted you back for hours.

s4.text: You make a big mistake at work.

s5.text: Someone cuts in front of you in line.
s5.right: Let it go, not worth the energy

s6.text: Your ex posts a photo with someone new.

s7.text: Your friend achieves something you've always wanted.

s8.left: Get frustrated and give up explaining

s9.text: You feel completely overwhelmed by everything in life.
s9.right: Seek help and allow yourself to rest

s10.text: A stranger is rude to you for no reason.
s10.left: Be rude right back at them
s10.right: Feel empathy — they might be having a bad day

child.name: Emotional Child
child.desc: Your emotions are in the driver's seat! Like a child, you react before you think. Feelings hit hard and fast. The good news? Awareness is the first step to growth.

teen.name: Emotional Teenager
teen.desc: You're learning to manage your feelings, but it's still a work in progress. Sometimes you handle things well, other times emotions get the best of you.

young.name: Emotional Young Adult
young.desc: You're developing real emotional intelligence! You can usually manage your feelings, show empathy, and handle conflict with growing maturity.

mature.name: Emotionally Mature
mature.desc: You've reached a beautiful balance. You understand your emotions, set healthy boundaries, and approach life with empathy and wisdom.

elder.name: Emotional Elder
elder.desc: You possess deep emotional wisdom. You navigate life's storms with grace, hold space for others without losing yourself, and transform pain into growth.

share.title: Share Your Result
share.text: My emotional age is {age}! I'm "{tier}" 😢 Check yours:
